notes: When selecting cards for [red]Downgrade[/red]/[green]Upgrade[/green], the event will select from already upgraded cards and upgradable cards respectively. If there are fewer cards of the required type than needed (fewer than 2 upgraded cards or fewer than 4 upgradable cards), the event will downgrade/upgrade however many are available.
